post.title: Advisory Blog Post
post.description: Represents a dynamically created blog post or advisory insight in the system.

slug.description: URL-safe path representation of the title (e.g., standard-gst-updates).

excerpt.description: Brief description or summary of the post.

content.description: HTML safe rich-text content representing the main article body produced by SunEditor.

category.description: The compliance-oriented category of the blog post.

readTime.description: Estimated reading duration of the article.

tags.description: Keywords or tags associated with this advice.

isCustom.description: Identifies if the post was created dynamically by admin.

authorId.description: Google UID of the administrator who created the post.

authorLinkedin.description: LinkedIn profile link for the blog post author.

authorDesignation.description: Professional title or credential of the author.

authorFirm.description: Workplace or corporate affiliate of the author.

authorBio.description: Detailed background story or advisory credentials bio.

authorAvatar.description: URL or base64 placeholder for author profile headshot photo.

newsletter_subscriber.title: Newsletter Subscriber
newsletter_subscriber.description: Represents a captured user interest subscription for advisory and tax newsletter logs.

/posts/{postId}.description: Collection of dynamic blog posts or business insights.
